title: Implement No-value ScoreResult explanation source mode
description: Extend semantic reinforcement memory data sourcing to use production ScoreResult records where value='No' and run clustering over ScoreResult.explanation text within the report time range.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implementation progress: added ScoreResult query helper and VectorTopicMemory content_source mode 'score_result_no_explanation' to cluster production prediction explanations where value='No'.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Validation: Python syntax checks pass for modified files via . Added unit tests for ScoreResult No-explanation source path in vector_topic_memory_test.py.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Note: full pytest execution is currently blocked in this shell because  is not installed and  fails dependency resolution (langchain-community vs numba numpy constraints for python_full_version>=3.13).

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Validation update: python3 py_compile passed for modified Python files, and unit tests were added for score_result_no_explanation sourcing.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Execution note: full pytest run is blocked in this shell because pytest is missing and uv dependency resolution fails due langchain-community vs numba numpy constraints when resolving python_full_version>=3.13.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Code pushed on feature branch: ScoreResult No-explanation source mode is in commit 7cc12e97. Will validate behavior in post-merge report run.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Running live validation for content_source=score_result_no_explanation to produce evidence from real report execution.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Live run found a functional issue: GraphQL field listScoreResultByScoreIdAndUpdatedAt does not exist in this environment. Patching data fetch to use supported listScoreResultByScorecardIdAndUpdatedAt with local score filtering, then re-running report.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Patched ScoreResult fetch implementation: switched GraphQL query from unsupported listScoreResultByScoreIdAndUpdatedAt to listScoreResultByScorecardIdAndUpdatedAt with accountId+scoreId filters. Re-running live report validation now.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Re-run after query fix is now processing real ScoreResult data successfully. Current run has already retained non-zero No-explanation items (e.g., Shipping Address retained 102 from 3545 fetched; Patient Interest retained 51 from 3546 fetched). Awaiting full completion/report ID.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Performance fix added: ScoreResult retrieval now caches a single scorecard+date window query and filters by scoreId in-process, eliminating repeated full-window API scans per score. Local unit tests passing (vector_topic_memory_test.py).

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Validation run after optimization progressed into embedding stage. For score Medication Review (7-day window), source mode retained 561 No-explanation records from 780 fetched and started embedding batches successfully.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Validation success after fixes. Report f715b6a6-ebc0-46aa-b967-355a05cf2202 / Task 1fefef21-80b0-4839-897b-8a51d31f5db0 completed end-to-end for score Medication Review (score_id 53dee633-835b-4cf4-9174-f987793b03b2, 7 days). Pipeline stages succeeded: ScoreResult source retained 561 items (from 780 fetched), embeddings generated, S3 vectors indexed 561 docs, clustering completed with 4 clusters.
